```{r Figure S3a function}
library(readr)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(matrixStats)

# function to process a file and return a tidy dataframe for plotting
process_file <- function(filepath, direction_label) {
  df <- as_tibble(fread(here(filepath)))
  
  # define microarray and RNAseq individual signature columns
  microarray_cols <- colnames(df)[2:7]
  rnaseq_cols <- setdiff(colnames(df)[2:(ncol(df) - 2)], microarray_cols)

  # compute median of individual signatures for each platform
  median_micro <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, microarray_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)
  median_rna <- rowMedians(as.matrix(df[, rnaseq_cols]), na.rm = TRUE)

  # compute squared deviation from the median
  sq_dev_micro <- (df$aggregated_microarray - median_micro)^2 / length(microarray_cols)
  sq_dev_rna <- (df$aggregated_RNAseq - median_rna)^2 / length(rnaseq_cols)
  
  # combine into tidy data frame with direction label
  tibble(
    Pathway = df$Description,
    Microarray = sq_dev_micro,
    RNAseq = sq_dev_rna,
    Direction = direction_label
  ) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(Microarray, RNAseq), names_to = "Platform", values_to = "SquaredDeviation")
}
```

```{r Figure S3a plot}
# process both up- and dn-regulated pathways files
plot_df_up <- process_file("figures/marray_rnaseq_up_pathways.tsv", "Upregulated")
plot_df_dn <- process_file("figures/marray_rnaseq_dn_pathways.tsv", "Downregulated")

# combine both into one dataframe
combined_plot_df <- bind_rows(plot_df_up, plot_df_dn) %>%
  mutate(Direction = factor(Direction, levels = c("Upregulated", "Downregulated")))

# compute medians for label annotations
med_labels <- combined_plot_df %>%
  group_by(Direction, Platform) %>%
  summarise(SquaredDeviation = median(SquaredDeviation, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# plot
ggplot(combined_plot_df, aes(x = Platform, y = SquaredDeviation, fill = Platform)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_text(data = med_labels,
            aes(x = Platform, y = SquaredDeviation, label = format(SquaredDeviation, scientific = TRUE, digits = 3)
),
            vjust = -0.5,
            size = 3,
            color = "black",
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Squared deviation of aggregated signature from median of individual signatures",
    y = "Squared deviation",
    x = "Technology"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Direction) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none") +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

```
